calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion For Default Judgment; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants James E. Lane and James Donwenay Lane.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR #4761. Telephone: 415-572-6625. Email: scrozier@sftc.org.

Plaintiff Salvador Velasquez was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Court Certified Spanish speaking interpreter Margo Seely assisted Mr. Velasquez during this morning's proceedings.
Karina Velasquez, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants James E. Lane or James Donwenay Lane.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract and Unjust Enrichment was filed on May 11, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant James E. Lane took place on May 24, 2018 and was effectuated on June 4, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant James Donwenay Lane by mail via Acknowledgment of Receipt of Service on August 29, 2019. Return receipt, signed by defendant James Donwenay Lane, was Postmarked September 6, 2018.
Default as to defendants James E. Lane and James Donwenay Lane was entered on April 30, 2019.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Salvador Velasquez, and against the default defendants James E. Lane and James Donwenay Lane, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,173.76.
Costs - $795.00.

Total - $28,968.76.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Default Judgment; Declaration In Support; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
